subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! I swear by the Ancient Beauty that the Supreme Concourse hath loosed its tongue in praise of you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی عبدالبهاء قسم بجمال حق که ملا اعلی لسان بستایش شما گشوده و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
